status_quo: Portfolio NOI overstated by 12% due to misclassified capital expenses and lagging lease-up actuals. Investor reports diverge from property-management system data by the time they reach the board.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ links GL entries to lease abstracts and property-management actuals. The governed pipeline flagged 5 NOI discrepancies across 2 funds — providing a clear remediation path before quarterly reporting.
